Left winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT lost, OR-NOT none
Right winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT lost, OR-NOT lost

Longest Left: I 5-0 6-1 7-2 0-3 1-4 2-5 3-6 4-7 complete

8 + 8 = 16 > 8
Right will be truncated to length 8 - 8 = 0
